zh.action.epub_info.label: EPUB书籍信息
zh.action.epub_info.description: 解析EPUB文件，提取书籍元信息（标题、作者、语言、出版社等）和目录结构
zh.action.epub_chapters.label: EPUB章节内容
zh.action.epub_chapters.description: 解析EPUB文件，返回指定范围的章节内容（HTML文本和CSS）
zh.field.filePath.label: EPUB文件路径
zh.field.start.label: 起始章节
zh.field.count.label: 章节数量
zh.field.count.tooltip: 要加载的章节数量，0表示全部

en.action.epub_info.label: EPUB Book Info
en.action.epub_info.description: Parse an EPUB file to extract book metadata (title, author, language, publisher, etc.) and table of contents
en.action.epub_chapters.label: EPUB Chapter Content
en.action.epub_chapters.description: Parse an EPUB file and return chapter content (HTML text and CSS) for a specified range
en.field.filePath.label: EPUB File Path
en.field.filePath.tooltip: Absolute path to the EPUB file
en.field.start.label: Start Chapter
en.field.count.label: Chapter Count
en.field.count.tooltip: Number of chapters to load, 0 for all
